rationale: Add flexibility to extra_context, yes/no strings, list literals, successful hooks, and nested template variations

updates.replacement:
extra_context_object
    : '{}'
    | '{' extra_context_pair (',' extra_context_pair)* '}'
    ;

extra_context_pair
    : STRING ':' extra_context_value
    ;

extra_context_value
    : STRING
    | json_bool
    | list_literal
    | object_literal
    ;

list_literal
    : '[' (STRING (',' STRING)*)? ']'
    ;

object_literal
    : '{' (extra_context_pair (',' extra_context_pair)*)? '}'
    ;

extra_context_value
    : STRING
    | json_bool
    | list_literal
    | object_literal
    | yes_no_string
    ;
